title: epiluo #1956
definition:
1) to unloose, untie
 2) to clear (a controversy), decide, settle
 3) to explain (what is obscure and hard to understand)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to unloose, untie
 2) to clear (a controversy), decide, settle
 3) to explain (what is obscure and hard to understand)

    NASB:  to loose, to solve:
